pr_title: SDLC-24: Fix inflated available seat count in flight details
pr_body:
## Summary
Correct the available seat calculation used by flight details so it reports total seats minus booked seats instead of total plus booked seats.

## Planned changes
- Fix seat_inventory_counts in backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py
- Verify downstream flight detail assembly uses the corrected value
- Add regression coverage in backend/app/tests/test_flight_service.py

## Validation
- Targeted backend tests for seat inventory and flight service
- Verify flight detail output no longer exceeds aircraft capacity

## Notes
This is a localized backend fix with no expected frontend changes.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
